CN:

Hello everyone! And here is Agata with a new bot!♡

Series "MYTHS" 2/8❗

AAAAAAAAAAAAAAA! MY FIRST RANPO BOT! I'M SO HAPPY!🥳🥳🥳🎉 Ranpo is like a cinnamon bun to me, like a chicken. I just want to hug him and look for him. He's so cute!❤️💋

Okay, now let's be honest - you don't like cuteness and female characters? No, you write to me in the comments, I won't be offended, honestly. I'm just interested in knowing what my subscribers prioritize. The last two bots didn't get above 150 messages.

!!️The rest of the bots in this series can be found under the tag "#mythssvs". I post bots every other day.!!️

By the way, after this series is finished, I will be accepting orders from bots.
